mapper.select: SELECT si.id AS serviceItemId, si.owner_id AS ownerId, si.service_category_id AS serviceCategoryId, si.service_subcategory_id AS serviceSubcategoryId, si.main_equipment_id AS mainEquipmentId, CASE WHEN si.is_accepting_orders = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ownerAccepting, CASE WHEN si.status = 'ACTIVE' AND si.approve_status = 'PASSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS serviceItemActive, CASE WHEN ura.id IS NULL OR ura.auth_status = 'PASSED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS realnamePassed, CASE WHEN e.current_status = 'IDLE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS equipmentIdle, e.current_lat AS ownerLat, e.current_lng AS ownerLng, COALESCE(si.service_radius_km, e.service_radius_km, 15) AS serviceRadiusKm, si.min_area_mu AS minAreaMu, si.max_area_mu AS maxAreaMu, si.crop_tags AS cropTagsRaw, si.terrain_tags AS terrainTagsRaw, si.plot_tags AS plotTagsRaw FROM service_item si JOIN equipment e ON e.id = si.main_equipment_id LEFT JOIN user_real_auth ura ON ura.user_id = si.owner_id WHERE si.service_subcategory_id = #{subcategoryId} AND si.status = 'ACTIVE' AND si.approve_status = 'PASSED'
